description: Statistics card on a deep navy-blue subtly textured background. In the upper-left is the round white U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal (eagle with shield) beside three lines of white serif text reading 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement'. A thin dark-red horizontal rule runs full-width beneath the header. Centered below in large bold white serif type is the headline 'Enforcement Update' with a smaller serif subheading 'January 25, 2025'. The statistics are stacked and centered in large white serif numerals: '286 Arrests' and '421 Detainers Lodged'. At the bottom, centered in italic white serif, is the caption 'ICE single-day statistics'. There are no photos or illustrations.
notable_text: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement | Enforcement Update | January 25, 2025 | 286 Arrests | 421 Detainers Lodged | ICE single-day statistics
